use_cases: Navigate users back to the previous page or view in multi-step workflows
Provide intuitive navigation in dashboard and settings interfaces
Create smooth back navigation in e-commerce checkout flows
Enable hierarchical navigation in documentation and knowledge bases
Offer accessible back functionality in mobile-first applications
ai_summary: A sleek animated back button component featuring a hover interaction where the 'Back' text slides and fades while an arrow icon expands to fill the button width. Built with Tailwind CSS and Lucide icons, this minimalist navigation component provides smooth micro-interactions ideal for improving user experience in dashboards, e-commerce flows, and multi-page applications.
